ham.subject: Ticket #12345 Resolved – Backend API Refactor Complete
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to let everyone know that the Jira ticket #12345 has been fully resolved. The backend API refactor has been completed and the new endpoints are now live on the staging environment.

Key points:
- Updated the /users endpoint to return full profile data.
- Removed the deprecated /userInfo route.
- Added unit tests for the new validation logic.
- Deployed the changes to the staging server; you can check the logs here: <URL>

Please run a quick smoke test on your side and let me know if you encounter any issues. Once you confirm everything is working, I'll merge the changes into the main branch.

Thanks for your patience and support.

Best,
Arjun

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Zoom Meeting 3:00 PM
spam.body:
Dear User,

This is an automated notification from your organization’s IT department. Due to a recent security audit, we need you to join a mandatory Zoom meeting at 3:00 PM today. Failure to attend may result in a temporary suspension of your account.

Meeting Details:
- Topic: Security Compliance Briefing
- Time: 3:00 PM – 3:15 PM
- Link: <URL>
- Password: 123456

Please join the meeting immediately. If you have any questions, reply to this email or call the support line at 1800-123-456.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Security Team
